mapper.select: SELECT v.vote_id AS voteId, v.title, vc.candidate_id AS candidateId, vc.candidate_name AS candidateName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vote_record vr WHERE vr.candidate_id = vc.candidate_id) AS voteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vote_record vr2 WHERE vr2.vote_id = v.vote_id) AS totalVotes FROM vote v JOIN vote_candidate vc ON vc.vote_id = v.vote_id WHERE v.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY v.vote_id DESC, vc.candidate_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vote_record WHERE vote_id = #{voteId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vote_record (vote_id, candidate_id, member_id) VALUES (#{voteId}, #{candidateId}, #{memberId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vote WHERE vote_id = #{voteId} AND trip_id = #{tripId}
